info.name: ORCID
info.summary: Connect Nextcloud accounts to ORCID iDs
info.description: Users connect their account to their ORCID iD via ORCID OAuth. The verified mapping is available to other apps (e.g. publishing integrations) for cross-service user identification, in both directions: user to ORCID and ORCID to user.
info.author: Frederik Orellana, DTU
